scenarios.title: Cross-Tool Handoff

checks.name: synthetic checkpoint contains an open item
synthetic checkpoint contains a preserved constraint
official baseline commit is merged and pinned

evidence: PR #84636 head recorded as experimental reference only
gaps: Do not mark official until PR #84636 is merged and a post-merge commit is pinned.
Runner evaluates OpenClaw-style handoff behavior only; it does not claim protocol conformance.

scenarios.title: Constraint Preservation

checks.name: synthetic unsafe latest.md symlink is rejected
synthetic unsafe snapshots symlink is rejected
reviewed hard-constraint memory API is available

evidence: Synthetic filesystem-boundary fixture mirrors the PR #84636 security repair surface
gaps: This only covers file-boundary preservation, not a full hard-constraint writeback and review lifecycle.
